# Appdaddy.ai

> Appdaddy.ai is the world's fastest super-AI business ecosystem. It lets business owners, coaches, consultants, marketing agencies and freelancers find, plan, build and launch a complete marketing funnel in about 10 minutes using 20+ AI apps under one login — with no code and no team.

## Key facts
- Category: AI business ecosystem / SaaS (a "twenty-plus AI app studio").
- Core promise: from niche to a launched marketing funnel in ~10 minutes.
- Guided four-step flow: Find, Think, Build, Launch.
- Built for: business owners, coaches, consultants, marketing agencies, freelancers, course creators.
- Scale: 3000+ active subscribers.
- One unified login for all apps; each app shares your brand knowledge.
- Contact: info@appdaddy.ai

## The 20+ AI apps
- Niche Finder — real-time market, competitor and ICP analysis with a ready GTM plan.
- Knowledge Base — add brand knowledge so every AI app and chatbot answers in your voice.
- AEO Launchpad — auto-AEO analysis and launcher for organic and answer-engine traffic.
- AEO Website Builder — AEO-optimised landing pages, funnels and full sites in minutes.
- LMS — upload and sell courses alongside your software.
- App Builder — build custom mini/micro apps (enterprise).
- Video Studio — text-to-video, image-to-video and UGC-style videos.
- Image Studio — scroll-stopping image ads and website visuals.
- VidEd — auto-cut short reels from long-form videos.
- Book Writer — books up to 80k words with cover design and Amazon-ready formatting.
- AI Blog Writer — SEO blogs with automatic backlinks.
- Humaniser — natural, human-sounding content.
- Meta Ads AI — launch Meta ads directly from Appdaddy.
- WhatsApp API — broadcast messages via the official WhatsApp Business API.
- IVR Call — broadcast IVR calling campaigns to leads.
- Dual Chat — ChatGPT and Claude side by side.
- AI Chatbot — build and deploy unlimited AI chatbots.

## Enterprise
- White Label: run the entire platform under your own brand, logo and domain and sell to unlimited users. Available by request (info@appdaddy.ai).
- Black Label: the world's first black-label business model; enterprise-only, offered by eligibility.

## Pages
- Home: https://appdaddy.ai/
- Platform (all apps): https://appdaddy.ai/#platform
- Enterprise (White Label & Black Label): https://appdaddy.ai/#enterprise
- Affiliate (coming soon): https://appdaddy.ai/#affiliate
- Contact: https://appdaddy.ai/#contact
- Privacy Policy: https://appdaddy.ai/#privacy
- Terms of Use: https://appdaddy.ai/#terms

## FAQ
- What is Appdaddy.ai? A super-AI business ecosystem that lets you find, plan and launch a complete marketing funnel in about 10 minutes using 20+ AI apps under one login.
- How fast can I launch? Around 10 minutes, via the four-step Find, Think, Build, Launch flow.
- Who is it for? Business owners, coaches, consultants, agencies, freelancers and course creators.
- Do I need coding or a team? No — it is built for non-technical founders.
- How do I start? Use the Get Started button or email info@appdaddy.ai.
